subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out and for your interest in exploring a collaboration opportunity. We're open to discussing how our teams might work together.

Would any of the following slots work for an introductory call?
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Regarding your request for internal contact details, I'm not able to share that information directly. Please refer to our public website for general contact information.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best regards
